proposal1.heroHeadline: Slide UX is losing over 500 hours a year on manual proposal writing. Here's where it drains your resources.
proposal1.heroSubheadline: Currently, crafting a Slide UX proposal is a time-consuming task. Now, generate comprehensive proposals in 47 seconds.
proposal1.problemsIntro: Below are the ongoing losses Slide UX incurs due to manual proposal processes.

problems.title: Time Drain
problems.description: Slide UX spends approximately 30 hours per month on writing proposals. This is time not spent improving user experience strategies.

problems.title: Lost Deals
problems.description: Each delayed proposal risks losing client interest. This can translate into thousands of dollars in lost opportunities for Slide UX.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: Manually crafted proposals often lack consistent branding. This inconsistency can cost Slide UX credibility, impacting client trust.

problems.title: High Labor Costs
problems.description: Paying skilled team members to write proposals is costly. Slide UX could save $50,000 annually by automating this task.

problems.title: Missed Deadlines
problems.description: Proposal deadlines are sometimes missed due to manual processes. This can damage Slide UX's reputation in the fast-paced design industry.

problems.title: Limited Scalability
problems.description: As Slide UX grows, the current process can't scale efficiently. This limitation constrains potential revenue growth and market expansion.

proposal1.solutionIntro: Our AI system seamlessly replaces the burdensome manual proposal process.

solutions.title: Instant Proposal Creation
solutions.description: Currently, proposals take hours to draft. Our system completes them in under 60 seconds.

solutions.title: Consistent Branding
solutions.description: Manual proposals risk inconsistent branding. Our system ensures every proposal aligns perfectly with Slide UX's brand.

solutions.title: Cost Reduction
solutions.description: Proposal writing incurs high labor costs. Our system slashes these expenses, saving thousands annually.

solutions.title: Enhanced Client Engagement
solutions.description: Delayed proposals risk losing clients. Instant proposals keep prospects engaged and interested.

solutions.title: Scalable Operations
solutions.description: Current processes can't handle growth. Our system scales effortlessly with Slide UX's expansion.

proposal1.whyUsIntro: Four reasons this works. Not marketing claims. Engineering facts.

whyUsCards.title: Speed
whyUsCards.description: Every hour your team spends writing proposals is an hour not spent closing deals. This system gives those hours back. Lead data in, live proposal out, 60 seconds.

whyUsCards.title: Personalization
whyUsCards.description: Generic proposals get ignored. Personalized proposals close. The system reads each prospect's website and reflects their services, tone, and positioning back to them. Written from scratch, not templated.

whyUsCards.title: Ownership
whyUsCards.description: No monthly subscription bleeding your budget. No vendor deciding to raise prices or shut down. You own the source code, the infrastructure, and the data. Permanently.

whyUsCards.title: Support
whyUsCards.description: Personal onboarding, a video walkthrough your team can reference anytime, and one week of post-delivery support. You are not left figuring this out alone.

fearCards.title: You are probably thinking: our stack is complicated.
fearCards.sub: CRM, email, Sheets, Slack. The system connects to whatever you already use. No migration.

fearCards.title: You might be wondering if this breaks your current workflow.
fearCards.sub: It runs alongside everything you have. Nothing changes except the time you spend on proposals.

fearCards.title: You are concerned the output will not match your standards.
fearCards.sub: Revisions are part of the build. We configure, test, and refine until the output matches your bar exactly.

proposal1.teamIntro: Your point of contact. No handoffs, no account managers, no layers.

team.name: Ayush Chauhan
team.bio: Full-stack engineer specializing in AI automation for agencies and service businesses. Every engagement personally handled from architecture through deployment. 15+ systems built. Zero failed deliveries. Works async, ships fast.

proposal1.processIntro: What Working With Us Looks Like

process.title: Kickoff (Async or Call)
process.description: We map your workflow, services, and current proposal process. Can be a 15-minute call or handled entirely over email. By the end, we have everything needed to configure the system.

process.title: System Configuration
process.description: The engine gets configured with your services, pricing structure, tone of voice, and brand standards. Every proposal it generates will sound like your best strategist wrote it.

process.title: Build and QA
process.description: Test proposals generated and reviewed against your quality bar. Refinements continue until the output is indistinguishable from what your team produces manually.

process.title: Deployment and Handoff
process.description: Deployed to production with full infrastructure. You receive a video walkthrough, documentation, and complete source code. From this point, the system runs without us.

proposal1.pricingIntro: Two options. Both are one-time builds. No subscriptions, no recurring fees. You own the source code and infrastructure permanently.

pricing.name: Proposal Engine
pricing.subtitle: // Core System
pricing.description: Custom proposal automation configured for Slide UX's services, voice, and pricing structure.

pricing.name: Engine + AI Chatbot
pricing.subtitle: // Recommended
pricing.description: Everything above, plus an AI sales assistant embedded in every proposal. Handles objections, answers questions, and books calls for Slide UX around the clock.
features: AI chatbot on every proposal page

proposal1.ctaHeadline: See this running on your actual proposals.
proposal1.ctaDescription: Reply here or email Ayush directly. He will send the onboarding form. Takes about 10 minutes and the build starts the same day. Custom-configured for Slide UX.

proposal2.heroHeadline: Transform Acme Corp's User Engagement with Slide UX Expertise.
proposal2.heroSubheadline: We will craft a seamless user experience that turns visitors into loyal customers. Our team will work closely with you to revamp your digital presence over the next 12 weeks.
proposal2.problemsIntro: Every visitor leaving without engaging is a missed opportunity for Acme Corp.

problems.title: Low Conversion Rates
problems.description: Acme Corp is losing potential customers daily due to an inefficient user journey. Each bounce is a lost sale.

problems.title: Poor Mobile Experience
problems.description: With over 50% of users accessing your site via mobile, a non-optimized experience results in significant revenue loss.

problems.title: High Cart Abandonment
problems.description: Every item left in an abandoned cart is a direct hit to your bottom line. Enhancing the checkout process could reclaim this lost revenue.

problems.title: Slow Page Load Times
problems.description: Users expect quick load times. Each second delay means a 7% reduction in conversions for Acme Corp.

problems.title: Inconsistent Branding
problems.description: A lack of cohesive branding confuses users, leading to mistrust and lost brand loyalty.

problems.title: Complex Navigation
problems.description: Users struggle to find what they need, resulting in high exit rates and lost engagement opportunities.

proposal2.solutionIntro: Our solutions address these lost opportunities to enhance Acme Corp's digital success.

solutions.title: User Experience Design
solutions.description: We create intuitive design solutions that simplify user journeys, increasing conversions and engagement.

solutions.title: Mobile Optimization
solutions.description: Our team ensures your mobile site is fast and user-friendly, reclaiming lost mobile users.

solutions.title: Checkout Process Streamlining
solutions.description: We simplify the checkout process to reduce cart abandonment and boost sales.

solutions.title: Brand Consistency
solutions.description: We establish a cohesive brand experience across all touchpoints, building user trust and loyalty.

proposal2.whyUsIntro: At Slide UX, we bring warmth and expertise to every project.

whyUsCards.title: Proven Expertise
whyUsCards.description: With years of experience, we know how to deliver results that matter.

whyUsCards.title: Collaborative Approach
whyUsCards.description: We work alongside your team to ensure our solutions fit your unique needs.

whyUsCards.title: Fast Turnaround
whyUsCards.description: Our efficient processes mean we deliver quality work on time.

whyUsCards.title: Measurable Success
whyUsCards.description: We focus on metrics that show real improvements to your business.

team.name: Erin Young
team.bio: Erin leads strategy and client relationships, ensuring every client gets personalized attention and top-notch results.

process.description: We dive deep into understanding your business and users.

proposal2.ctaDescription: Let's chat about how we can elevate your digital presence. No commitments, just a conversation.

lead.company_description:
Your journey to a user-centered product starts here. Established 2012. Based in Austin, TX.

"More approachable. Less preachy."

That's what one industry expert said about why our user experience consultancy is so unique.

Headquartered in Austin, TX, we help digital product teams deliver better user experiences through thoughtful UI design, UX strategy, and user research.

Along the way, our experienced design leaders help you shift your organization's culture to put the user at the center. Our job is done when we help you bring on full-time UX talent to support your successful product.

We've got concentrated experience in sectors including:
- Manufacturing & Industrial Goods
- Transportation & Logistics
- Insurance & Risk Management
- IT Security 

We've been in business for over a decade, and have helped over 200 product & marketing teams create great user experiences. We can help you, too.

Our programs make it easy to get started. Learn about our services, browse our clients, case studies or reviews, or just book a call to find our whether we're there's a fit.

Get in touch with us at info@slideux.com.
